channel.title: Publishing on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Publishing on Pi Stack

item.title: Memos vs Plume vs WriteFreely: Best Self-Hosted Microblogging Platforms 2026
item.description: If you want to publish your thoughts online without handing your data to Twitter/X, Medium, or Substack, self-hosted microblogging platforms give you full ownership of your content. These lightweight alternatives let you capture ideas, write posts, and share them — on your own server, with your own rules.
